title: hieracium umbellatum subsp. scabriusculum
intro: Hieracium umbellatum subsp. scabriusculum, also known as a lesser hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium umbellatum subsp. scabriusculum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
